name: Bob's Burger Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté beef with onions until the beef is browned.
2. Add tomato juice and water to the pan. Stir well to combine.
3. Bring the mixture to a simmer for a few minutes.
4. Add cream of mushroom soup and seasonings (basil, dill weed, Italian seasoning, marjorum, oregano, bay leaves). Stir until well mixed.
5. Bring the soup to a boil once all ingredients are added.
6. Add peas and noodles to the pot. Stir gently.
7. Simmer for 30 minutes or until the vegetables are tender.
